# Tasks

## Phase 1 - Project Setup

* Initialize FastAPI project
* Create folder structure (agents, services, models, utils)
* Add requirements.txt

## Phase 2 - Ingestion

* Implement file upload API
* Extract text from PDF, DOCX, TXT

## Phase 3 - Preprocessing

* Clean and normalize text
* Split text into chunks

## Phase 4 - Core Agents

* Implement semantic_agent (embedding-based similarity)
* Implement web_search_agent (search API integration)
* Implement academic_agent (corpus comparison)
* Implement ai_detection_agent (AI text detection)

## Phase 5 - Parallel Execution

* Implement orchestrator using asyncio
* Run all detection agents in parallel

## Phase 6 - Aggregation

* Combine agent outputs into final score
* Add weighted scoring logic

## Phase 7 - Intelligence Layer

* Add confidence scoring
* Add explainability module

## Phase 8 - Reporting

* Generate structured JSON report
* Highlight plagiarized sections

## Phase 9 - Optimization

* Add caching layer
* Optimize performance

## Phase 10 - Testing

* Add unit tests
* Add evaluation pipeline
